item.title: My Bitch Ex Girlfriend Got Her Third Dui
item.description:
God damn what a cunt.

I had no idea she was also a Nazi tweaker sack of shit when I met her. I was homeless and needed a place to stay and she offered me a place for a little while.

2 years of being made to feel inadequate while she cheated on me with all these weird Nordic church friends of hers.

Her first DUI was before I met her, and after living with her family for a while, I learned some interesting things. Her mom was dying of cancer and blamed the cancer on her.
